title: Neviti - Scripted Marble - Luggage Tags, Pack of 10
features: Elegant hexagonal shape with marble and gold design
Coordinate with the full Scripted Marble collection
description: Product Description These cute luggage tags make a versatile addition to your wedding accessories, whether you’re looking for a way to jazz up your table napkins, wedding favours or cutlery. Featuring a smart hexagonal design edged in Gold, the labels utilise the distinctive look of our Scripted Marble collection. Embellished with Gold text saying 'thank you’, the tags are supplied with simple white ribbon so you can attach them to your chosen items. Pack of 10. Box Contains 10 x luggage tags - small
